item.title: First reading, referred to Environment & Energy.
item.description: First reading, referred to Environment & Energy.

item.title: Spokane proposes 'glide path' to stop $8M in climate fees from hitting taxpayers | Washington | thecentersquare.com
item.description: News article "Spokane proposes 'glide path' to stop $8M in climate fees from hitting taxpayers | Washington | thecentersquare.com" from The Center Square.

item.title: 👍Chris Averyt - City of Spokane
item.description: Chris Averyt signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent City of Spokane.

item.description: Lisa Brown signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Mayor, City of Spokane.

item.description: Paul Dillon signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Spokane City Councilmember District 2, Position 1. They are a registered lobbyist.
